scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @ai-orchestrator/protocol build && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-orchestrator/providers build && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-orchestrator/agents build && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-orchestrator/server typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @ai-orchestrator/desktop typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm -r --if-present test
